task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Full SaaS: Project Tracker** (Level 10)

Build a project management API. Users register/login. Projects have name, description, status (active/archived). Tasks belong to projects with title, description, status (todo/in_progress/done), assignee_id. Auth required. Users can only see projects they own. Full CRUD on both resources.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique, email
  password, required
  name
final_source:
/*
SAAS PROJECT TRACKER (Level 10)
Users register/login. Projects owned by users. Tasks belong to projects.
Auth required on all mutations. Users only see their own projects.

TABLES:
  Users: email*, password*, name*
  Projects: name*, description, status, owner_id*
  Tasks: title*, description, status, project_id*, assignee_id

ENDPOINTS:
  POST /api/register — create user
  POST /api/login — authenticate, return token
  POST /api/projects [auth] — create project
  GET /api/projects [auth] — list user's projects
  GET /api/projects/:id [auth] — get one project
  PUT /api/projects/:id [auth] — update project
  DELETE /api/projects/:id [auth] — delete project
  POST /api/tasks [auth] — create task
  GET /api/tasks — list all tasks
  GET /api/tasks/:id [auth] — get one task
  PUT /api/tasks/:id [auth] — update task
  DELETE /api/tasks/:id [auth] — delete task
*/

build for javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique, email
  password, required
  name, required

create a Projects table:
  name, required
  description
  status
  owner_id, required

create a Tasks table:
  title, required
  description
  status
  project_id, required
  assignee_id

# Registration endpoint
when user sends data to /api/register:
  validate data:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required
    name is text, required
  user = save data to Users
  send back user with status 201

# Login endpoint
# Login endpoint - find user by email manually (workaround)
when user sends credentials to /api/login:
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required
  users = get all Users
  user_found = null
  for each user in users:
    if user's email is credentials's email:
      set user_found to user
  if user_found is null:
    send back 'Invalid email or password' with status 401
  if user_found's password is not credentials's password:
    send back 'Invalid email or password' with status 401
  send back {token: 'jwt-token', user_id: user_found's id} with status 200
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required
  user = look up User where email is credentials's email
  if user is empty:
    send back 'Invalid email or password' with status 401
  if user's password is not credentials's password:
    send back 'Invalid email or password' with status 401
  send back {token: 'jwt-token', user_id: user's id} with status 200

# Create project (auth required)
when user calls POST /api/projects sending data:
  requires login
  set data's owner_id to current_user's id
  project = save data to Projects
  send back project with status 201

# List user's projects (auth required)
when user calls GET /api/projects:
  requires login
  projects = get all Projects where owner_id is current_user's id
  send back projects

# Get one project (auth required)
when user calls GET /api/projects/:id:
  requires login
  project = look up Project with this id
  if project's owner_id is not current_user's id:
    send back 'Forbidden' with status 403
  send back project

# Update project (auth required)
when user calls PUT /api/projects/:id sending update_data:
  requires login
  project = look up Project with this id
  if project's owner_id is not current_user's id:
    send back 'Forbidden' with status 403
  save update_data to Projects
  send back 'updated' with status 200

# Delete project (auth required)
when user calls DELETE /api/projects/:id:
  requires login
  project = look up Project with this id
  if project's owner_id is not current_user's id:
    send back 'Forbidden' with status 403
  delete Project with this id
  send back 'deleted' with status 200

# Create task (auth required)
when user calls POST /api/tasks sending data:
  requires login
  project = look up Project with data's project_id
  if project's owner_id is not current_user's id:
    send back 'Forbidden' with status 403
  task = save data to Tasks
  send back task with status 201

# List all tasks
when user calls GET /api/tasks:
  tasks = get all Tasks
  send back tasks

# Get one task (auth required)
when user calls GET /api/tasks/:id:
  requires login
  task = look up Task with this id
  project = look up Project with task's project_id
  if project's owner_id is not current_user's id:
    send back 'Forbidden' with status 403
  send back task

# Update task (auth required)
when user calls PUT /api/tasks/:id sending update_data:
  requires login
  task = look up Task with this id
  project = look up Project with task's project_id
  if project's owner_id is not current_user's id:
    send back 'Forbidden' with status 403
  save update_data to Tasks
  send back 'updated' with status 200

# Delete task (auth required)
when user calls DELETE /api/tasks/:id:
  requires login
  task = look up Task with this id
  project = look up Project with task's project_id
  if project's owner_id is not current_user's id:
    send back 'Forbidden' with status 403
  delete Task with this id
  send back 'deleted' with status 200
